name: Kyberion How-To Narrated Demo
description: Produce a minimal narrated video that explains how to use Kyberion: check baseline, create a mission, run a pipeline, and verify outputs.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.

context.voice_script: この動画では、受け取った brief を content brief に整理し、storyboard を作り、render までつなげる流れを示します。
context.hook_text: 受け取った前提を、そのまま動画にしない。
context.feature_text: 訴求対象、利用シーン、伝える順序を整理し、必要な見出し・画面・尺を定義します。
context.cta_text: 最後に content brief を storyboard と render 用の指示に変換して渡します。

content.title: Kyberion How-To: Brief to Video in 3 Steps
content.audience: operators and decision makers who already know the target use case and need a reliable way to turn approved messaging into a video asset
content.objective: convert a fixed strategic brief into a renderable narrated video package
content.promise: Kyberion turns operational intent into governed execution and artifact-backed outputs
content.desired_takeaway: brief, storyboard, and render bundle are all traceable outputs
constraints: do not position the video as a product pitch
focus on the transformation from instruction to content
keep the visual language governed and deterministic
proof_points: render bundle and mp4 are produced
content_requirements: show how the team receives a decided brief
show how audience, use case, and constraints are translated into a content outline
show how the outline becomes a narrated video brief and render plan

fixed_inputs.customer: teams that want auditable, resumable operations
fixed_inputs.use_case: repeatable mission-driven work with clear evidence trails
fixed_inputs.message: Kyberion turns operational intent into governed execution and artifact-backed outputs

video_content_brief.title: Kyberion How-To: Brief to Video in 3 Steps
video_content_brief.audience: operators and decision makers who already know the target use case and need a reliable way to turn approved messaging into a video asset
video_content_brief.objective: convert a fixed strategic brief into a renderable narrated video package
video_content_brief.promise: Kyberion turns operational intent into governed execution and artifact-backed outputs
video_content_brief.desired_takeaway: brief, storyboard, and render bundle are all traceable outputs
constraints: do not position the video as a product pitch
focus on the transformation from instruction to content
keep the visual language governed and deterministic
proof_points: render bundle and mp4 are produced
content_requirements: show how the team receives a decided brief
show how audience, use case, and constraints are translated into a content outline
show how the outline becomes a narrated video brief and render plan

fixed_inputs.customer: teams that want auditable, resumable operations
fixed_inputs.use_case: repeatable mission-driven work with clear evidence trails
fixed_inputs.message: Kyberion turns operational intent into governed execution and artifact-backed outputs

params.cmd: if test -f {{video_output_path}}; then echo 'video already rendered'; else ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i color=c=0x07111f:s=640x360 -frames:v 1 -update 1 {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-cover.png && ffmpeg -y -loop 1 -framerate 25 -i {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-cover.png -t 6 -c:v libx264 -preset ultrafast -crf 35 -pix_fmt yuv420p {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-howto-silent.mp4 && ffmpeg -y -i {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-howto-silent.mp4 -i {{narration_path}} -c:v copy -c:a aac -t 6 -movflags +faststart {{video_output_path}}; fi

params.content:
# Kyberion How-To Narrated Demo

## Scenario flow
1. Receive a fixed brief with audience, use case, and message already decided.
2. Convert the brief into a content outline and a renderable video brief.
3. Generate narration and compose the scene bundle.
4. Render, verify, extract key frames, and reject black-frame output.

## Output artifacts
- Content brief: `{{content_brief_path}}`
- Narration: `{{narration_path}}`
- Video: `{{video_output_path}}`
- Bundle: `{{video_bundle_dir}}`
- Key frames: `{{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-howto-frames/`

## Validation
- `{{preflight_result}}`
- `{{voice_result}}`
- `{{video_result}}`
- `{{verify_result}}`
- `{{frame_extract_result}}`
- `{{blackframe_result}}`
- `{{duration_alignment_result}}`

## Next command
- `pnpm pipeline --input pipelines/kyberion-howto-narrated-demo.json`

params.message: 🏁 [KYBERION-HOWTO] Narrated demo complete. Voice: {{voice_result}} Video: {{video_result}} Verify: {{verify_result}}
